sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_edges (index UInt64, edge_length Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY index;
UPDATE h3_edges SET edge_length = h3ExactEdgeLengthKm(1310277011704381440) WHERE index = 1310277011704381440;
SELECT index, edge_length FROM h3_edges WHERE edge_length > 0.5;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM h3_edges WHERE edge_length BETWEEN 1.0 AND 2.0;
